headline: Senior ML Engineer | FinTech AI | Ex-Razorpay
summary: 5+ years building production ML systems for fraud detection and credit scoring at scale. Led the deployment of real-time inference pipelines serving 10M+ transactions/day. Passionate about applying LLMs and RAG to financial document understanding.

experience.title: Senior Machine Learning Engineer
experience.description: Built real-time fraud detection models using PyTorch, achieving 94% precision at 1% FPR. Deployed models via SageMaker endpoints with MLflow tracking. Implemented RAG pipeline for internal KYC document processing using LangChain.

experience.title: ML Engineer
experience.description: Developed credit scoring models using XGBoost and deep learning. Built automated feature engineering pipelines with Kubernetes-orchestrated batch jobs. Contributed to open-source fraud detection toolkit (200+ GitHub stars).

experience.title: Data Scientist Intern
experience.description: Worked on NLP-based contract analysis for loan documents. Built text classification models using BERT fine-tuning.

publications: Reddy, V. et al. (2023) 'Real-time Fraud Detection at Scale using Graph Neural Networks', AAAI Workshop on AI in FinTech.
projects: LangChain RAG pipeline for KYC document processing
Real-time credit scoring API (10M+ daily inferences)
